subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God hath been raised from the Tree of Paradise unto the Concourse on High, and proclaimeth the truth in the dominion of His Cause, that haply [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله فی شجره الفردوس للملاء العالین و ینطق بالحق فی جبروت الامر لعل
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
